title: Liar's Bar Resource Pack for Kyou
description:
Dedicated Resource_Pack for “Liar's Bar for Kyou” Data Pack

骗子酒馆数据包的专属资源包
body:
Dedicated Resource_Pack for “Liar's Bar for Kyou” Data Pack！
 By installing “Liar's Bar for Kyou” data pack, you can join your friends and play the recently popular Steam game "Liar's Bar" within Minecraft. The game rules are the same as the Steam version. Below are instructions on how to install and the game rules!

“Liar's Bar for Kyou” Data Pack, please see here:

[Liars_bar_for_kyou](https://modrinth.com/datapack/liars_bar_for_kyou)

After using this Resource_Pack, you can display the A、Q、K.
There are also joker cards, demon cards, card backs, and a revolver used for Russian roulette.

这个骗子酒馆forKyou 数据包的专属资源包，使用这个资源包之后，可以显示扑克牌中的A、Q、K。
还有坤坤卡牌、恶魔卡牌、卡牌背面、一把用于俄罗斯轮盘赌的左轮枪。

“骗子酒馆forKyou”数据包请看这里：

[Liars_bar_for_kyou](https://modrinth.com/datapack/liars_bar_for_kyou)
